item.title: Fat Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Fat Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
Fat Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Have you lost official documents from corrupted HDD? Visit website www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com to download files retrieval utility which salvages misplaced data from FAT partitioned HDD. Inexpensive Fat Recovery software restores data permanently deleted using shift+del keys from hard disk media devices. Hard disk data retrieval application rescue documents from formatted FAT partitioned hard disk media storage devices.

[read more]

Hard disk data retrieval application rescue documents from formatted FAT partitioned hard disk media storage devices.

Fat Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Have you lost official documents from corrupted HDD? Visit website www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com to download files retrieval utility which salvages misplaced data from FAT partitioned HDD. Hard disk data retrieval application rescue documents from formatted FAT partitioned hard disk media storage devices.

item.title: Windows Vista Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Windows Vista Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Vista Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Laptop partition files recovery service demonstrates effective data restoration solution rescue accidentally erased digital pictures, images, missing photographs and undelete windows partition. Notebook windows data recovery operates upon FAT, NTFS and NTFS5 file system get back your data after software failure, virus attack and power surge. Hard drive data recovery application detects corrupted master boot records (MBR), master file table (MFT) or root directory and recover laptop or notebook data. Professional data recovery program retrieves lost or inaccessible files from any type corrupted windows NTFS, FAT partition and support all types of hard disk like SATA, ATA, SCSI, EIDE etc. Notebook files recovery services scans the complete boot sector and previews them according to file types retrieve lost files (like jpeg, jpg, mp3, zip, rar, pdf, bmp, gif etc). Graphical user interface (GUI) oriented software fetch data which containing the bad sector and provide effective solution for recovery of your lost Microsoft office documents (like word, excel access and power point). Feature: * Software retrieve files folders lost due to corrupted, damaged or formatted hard drive partitions. * Recovery tool recuperate lost rar, xls, doc, zip, pdf, files from all different storage devices such as SATA, ATA, SCCI, IDE etc. * Support all Microsoft windows operating system. * Rescue accidentally deleted digital pictures, audio video songs, images, missing photographs. * Non destructive and user friendly utility provide full backup of data lost due to hard drive malfunctioning. * Application recovers permanently erased (Shift + Del) recycle bin data. * Software is user friendly gives in-built step-by-step data recovery help option. * Extract data lost due to virus hit or software mistake. * Restoration tool restore lost audio, video music files from all external USB storage drive. * Provides thumbnail view of recoverable data before saving it.

[read more]
item.description:
Windows Vista Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Laptop partition files recovery service demonstrates effective data restoration solution rescue accidentally erased digital pictures, images, missing photographs and undelete windows partition. Notebook windows data recovery operates upon FAT, NTFS and NTFS5 file system get back your data after software failure, virus attack and power surge. [read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer EML to Yahoo Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer EML to Yahoo Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer EML to Yahoo Importer
(Utilities)
ToolsBaer EML to Yahoo Importer is a reliable and safe utility for bulk conversion of EML files to Yahoo account files. This program makes sure that during the conversion process, the original layout of the folder and the integrity of the data are maintained. This program guarantees a smooth converting procedure without any data loss and is both safe and user-friendly. Time is saved for the user as it converts EML data into emails in the Yahoo account file. Both technical and non-technical users can simply operate this program because of its simple design. With this program, users can store their exported data on the desktop in the correct area. Users can convert EML files to the Yahoo account file with this application without having to install any other software. Users can convert the first 10 emails from each folder in the software's trial versions. It supports every version of Windows OS, including 8, 8.1, 10, 11, Vista, and XP. The best users for this program are those who are both private and professional. Before deciding to purchase, users can download and use the complete ToolsBaer EML to Yahoo Importer trial version.

[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery Pen Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Pen Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Pen Drive
(Utilities)
Do you want to retrieve and restore your official documents from USB storage drive? Data Recovery Pen Drive application now is available on website www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com to regain videos, images, pictures, text documents, media files and other memorable data that lost due to hardware failure without any expert guidance. Advance flash drive data retrieval program provides highly capable GUI interface so that software easily use by any user for repairing your formatted USB storage drive within less time duration.

item.title: Undelete for Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete for Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete for Mac
(Utilities)
Compatible and convenient Undelete for mac software is designed with highly restoration capabilities that enables all type of users whether technical or non technical to get back their corrupted digital images in form of priceless party album, school trip photographs, cute baby snapshot, favorite collection of wallpaper, download pictures, memorable moment’s snap, marriage photos, anniversary pictures, historical place snap and many more just in smaller amount of time and in turn save their valuable money as well as efforts in hiring external person. Technically sound yet easy to use MAC digital picture recovery application empowers you to regain intentionally or unintentionally deleted valuable photographs that are saved in multiple file formats is simplified manner. Most affordable Undelete for mac provides the comprehensive way to restore your overall missed images from logically crashed USB drives without making any alteration in pixel size and resolution of photos. Outstanding Apple Photo restoration utility for Mac OSx make use of inbuilt deep disk scanning algorithm to search all lost, deleted misplaced, corrupted or damaged images in less time span and resaves at specified location in your personal computer. Fully featured Undelete for mac has great compatibility with all Mac operating system enabled machine with no extra software installation. Professionally developed Mac digital photo recovery tool restores your accidentally deleted important snapshots, photo galleries and unforgettable pictures from corrupted, formatted, virus infected, logically crashed or untraceable removable USB storage drives in minimum time period with your nominal efforts. Features: * Reasonable priced Undelete for mac utility supports all major USB drives to salvage lost images. * Flexible Undelete for mac application regains entire deleted pictures just in few easy steps. * Undelete for mac tool efficiently works with all major Mac OS installed computers/notebook.

[read more]

item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Click on website address www.undelete.co.in to download Digital Camera Files Recovery application that helps user to retrieve all missing holiday images and other snapshots from digital camera damaged due to accident in few simple steps. Professional camera file restore utility offers user to repair all lost files and save them in many file extensions like bmp, jpg and more. Digital video camera photo regains tool supports quick and easy rescue of various wallpapers and photographs with no technical difficulty.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Company provides efficient highly technical innovative recovery program with advanced features to help you easily restore your accidently deleted audio, video, images, pictures, photos, snaps, films, songs, movies, mp3, mp4 and other media files from storage devices. Digital Camera Data Recovery software restores files deleted due to memory card being pulled out while camera is in working mode. Digital camera image retrieval tool support all major digital camera brands including Sony, Samsung, Compaq, Acer, Kingston, Canon, Nikon, Hitachi and other major brands. Website www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com provides technology based digital camera recovery programs for users to regain their corrupted storage media in easy and effective manner. Data recovery program provides standard solution to effectively restore entire corrupted mp3, mp4, audio, video, files and other documents from mass storage media and also support all types of file formats including text files(doc, txt, rtf, pdf), images files(jpg, mpg, gif, bmp), audio files(mp3, mp4, midi),video files(mov, wav, avi) and other similar formats. Digital camera image retrieval tool is easy to use and has interactive user friendly GUI interface for users to easily operate the software. Important features: *Digital Camera data recovery tool support all major digital camera brands to revive lost data. *Data recovery program provides accurate recovery of formatted images from digital camera storage devices. *Effective digital camera data recover utility is simple and easy to use software. *Digital camera image retrieval tool is designed for both technical and non-technical users.

[read more]

item.title: NTFS Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Recovery
(Utilities)
www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com offers files rescue tool for retrieving information misplaced due to formatting or reformatting of hard disk media storage devices. Easy to use files restore tool is helpful for restoring pictures ,text, audio video deleted from NTFS formatted hard disk media devices of file extension including gif, jpeg, bmp, tiff, mov, txt, pdf, doc, html, wav, mp3, mpeg, mp4 etc. Cost effective disk restore application is non destructible tool for rescuing files deleted from NTFS formatted hard disk media storage devices. Professional files rescue utility is specialized for rescuing permanently or accidentally deleted data due to operating system failure in simple clicks of mouse. Popular disk rescue application allows restoring deleted information and operates in compatible manner with Windows based operating system including Windows11, Windows10, Windows8, Windows7 etc. Easy to download NTFS Recovery is specialized for retrieving missing data from HDD even when drive not formatted or drive not detected error messages appears. Proficient disk recovery application is helpful for restoring documents from hard disk devices of brands including western digital, Seagate, Samsung, quantum, Hitachi, transcend etc. Affordable data recovery software operates in compatible manner with hard disk devices of standards including SCSI, SATA, EIDE, SCSI etc.Features *Disk rescue utility is used by experts for restoring missing information of long file name extension from NTFS formatted HDD.*Rescue data application restores misplaced information from virus corrupted hard disk media storage devices. *Application files restore is specialized in restoring information missing due to format partition and logical error. *Software provided with facility of restoring missing files from HDD without any expert guidance.

[read more]

NTFS Recovery
(Utilities)
www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com offers files rescue tool for retrieving information misplaced due to formatting or reformatting of hard disk media storage devices. [read more]

item.title: Image Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Image Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Image Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Image recovery software easily retrieves accidentally damaged or unreadable photographs, album, snaps or digital pictures due to virus attack or any hardware software malfunction. Photo recovery program with user interactive GUI interface can safely recover all types of image files even after “DRIVE NOT FORMATTED”, “Boot disk failure” or other similar error messages are displayed at your laptop or desktop screen. Advance picture restoration tool has some new feature like provides thumbnail preview of all lost photos and allows user to restore his desired photo by simply select and run recovery wizard in your USB storage drive. Utility quickly recovers all digital photos from digital camera and accurately save all data in a user specified safe location on hard drive for future use. Deleted photograph repair tool extremely scans and undelete deleted snaps from all type of USB storage drive such as zip drive, sD card, xD card, memory sticks, smart media etc. Software facilitates secure image restoration and runs with all windows based operating system likes Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. Digital photo backup utility effectively restores image file format from all type of memory card that has been pulled out while camera is on. Features: * Digital picture files restoration tool easily scans and safely recovers erased, deleted or damaged images. * Software supports all type of FAT and NTFS based file system. * Photos rescue utility restores all pictures and images from non removable as well as removable media in its accurate formats. * Reliable and easy to use software can be use by any professional or normal user without any technical knowledge. * Picture files retrieval software support all formats of pictures including tiff, bmp, gif, jpg, jpeg, riff etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Image Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Image recovery software easily retrieves accidentally damaged or unreadable photographs, album, snaps or digital pictures due to virus attack or any hardware software malfunction. Photo recovery program with user interactive GUI interface can safely recover all types of image files even after “DRIVE NOT FORMATTED”, “Boot disk failure” or other similar error messages are displayed at your laptop or desktop screen. Advance picture restoration tool has some new feature like provides thumbnail preview of all lost photos and allows user to restore his desired photo by simply select and run recovery wizard in your USB storage drive. Utility quickly recovers all digital photos from digital camera and accurately save all data in a user specified safe location on hard drive for future use. Deleted photograph repair tool extremely scans and undelete deleted snaps from all type of USB storage drive such as zip drive, sD card, xD card, memory sticks, smart media etc. Software facilitates secure image restoration and runs with all windows based operating system likes Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. Digital photo backup utility effectively restores image file format from all type of memory card that has been pulled out while camera is on. Features: * Digital picture files restoration tool easily scans and safely recovers erased, deleted or damaged images. * Software supports all type of FAT and NTFS based file system. * Photos rescue utility restores all pictures and images from non removable as well as removable media in its accurate formats. * Reliable and easy to use software can be use by any professional or normal user without any technical knowledge. * Picture files retrieval software support all formats of pictures including tiff, bmp, gif, jpg, jpeg, riff etc.

[read more]

Image recovery software easily retrieves accidentally damaged or unreadable photographs, album, snaps or digital pictures due to virus attack or any hardware software malfunction. Photo recovery program with user interactive GUI interface can safely recover all types of image files even after “DRIVE NOT FORMATTED”, “Boot disk failure” or other similar error messages are displayed at your laptop or desktop screen. Advance picture restoration tool has some new feature like provides thumbnail preview of all lost photos and allows user to restore his desired photo by simply select and run recovery wizard in your USB storage drive. Utility quickly recovers all digital photos from digital camera and accurately save all data in a user specified safe location on hard drive for future use. Deleted photograph repair tool extremely scans and undelete deleted snaps from all type of USB storage drive such as zip drive, sD card, xD card, memory sticks, smart media etc. Software facilitates secure image restoration and runs with all windows based operating system likes Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. Digital photo backup utility effectively restores image file format from all type of memory card that has been pulled out while camera is on. Features: * Digital picture files restoration tool easily scans and safely recovers erased, deleted or damaged images. * Software supports all type of FAT and NTFS based file system. * Photos rescue utility restores all pictures and images from non removable as well as removable media in its accurate formats. * Reliable and easy to use software can be use by any professional or normal user without any technical knowledge. * Picture files retrieval software support all formats of pictures including tiff, bmp, gif, jpg, jpeg, riff etc.

[read more]
